# The Identity Audit Protocol — Soy Consciencia Elevada
> https://sce-identity-audit.vercel.app

The Identity Audit Protocol is a 20-question diagnostic assessment that identifies the specific identity mechanism blocking a person's execution and follow-through. It produces a personalized report mapping the exact psychological pattern at the root of inconsistency, avoidance, and self-sabotage.

## What it does
- 20 structured questions identifying the core identity mechanism (not generic advice)
- Personalized diagnostic report: names the mechanism, maps how it shows up, links to a clear direction
- Two tiers: Standard report ($37) and VIP Identity Integration Protocol ($97, includes implementation guidance)

## Who it's for
Entrepreneurs, creators, and driven individuals who keep starting but not finishing — who know what to do but can't get themselves to do it consistently. Especially those who've tried productivity systems without lasting results.

## The distinction
Most execution problems are identity problems, not discipline problems. This protocol identifies which specific identity pattern is active — not a generic personality type, but the exact mechanism operating in the person's case.

## Pricing
- Standard: $37 USD — 7-day full refund
- VIP Identity Integration Protocol: $97 USD

## Purchase
https://whop.com/soy-consciencia-elevada/

## Brand
Soy Consciencia Elevada — conscious leadership and identity work for entrepreneurs.
